# Project Desctription 

Jamie Element's project for the AI Copilot Hackathon.


## Project Guidelines
- Maintain consistent styling across all pages
- Keep file and folder names descriptive and organized
- when generating new files, if there are not any existing files of that type, look for an appropriate set of standards from https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/tree/main/instructions to add to our repo as a new instruction file under `.github/instructions`. This will help ensure high standards for code quality and consistency across the project.

# Documentation
- Any time you are prompted, make a note of the prompt and the response in a markdown file in the `docs` folder. This will help us keep track of the development process and decisions made along the way.
- Include any relevant code snippets, explanations, and reasoning behind the decisions made in response to the prompts. This documentation will be valuable for future reference and for anyone else who may work on the project in the future.
